A Few Words

Something I wanted to tell you

Click the seal to open it.

D
tap to open
My dear Diana,

It's strange how time works. We've only known each other a little over a week, and yet somehow it already feels like much longer. Some people take months to feel familiar — you did it in days.

In this short time, I've seen how kind you are, how much light you bring into a room, and how fully you live — chasing new countries, new dance floors, a life with no interest in standing still.

I still find it remarkable that you're a surgeon — that the same hands trusted with something as serious as someone's life are the ones that light up at the sight of flowers. That contrast says a lot about your heart.

You are interesting in the best way — never predictable, always a little surprising, somehow already someone I'm genuinely grateful to know.

So today, I just want you to feel celebrated. Not because of how long we've known each other, but because of how much you already mean in the time we've had.

Happy birthday, Diana. Here's to many more conversations, more stories, and many more reasons to celebrate you.

ABC with gratitude & admiration
Captured Moments

A few of your moments

Every one of these already looks like you — bold, beautiful, and never quite still.

In My Eyes

Why you stood out

Click a card — there's a reason behind every one of these.

Her Kindness

tap to read

Warm from the very first hello — the kind of kind that doesn't try, it just is.

Her Spirit

tap to read

Every conversation with you goes somewhere unexpected. You're genuinely, refreshingly interesting.

Her Love For Flowers

tap to read

A bouquet means more to you than almost anything — and somehow, that small joy says everything about your heart.

Her Love For Travel

tap to read

New countries, new skylines, new stories — you chase the world like it owes you nothing, and somehow it keeps giving you everything.

Her Dressing Sense

tap to read

You make an entrance without even trying. Effortless, polished, completely your own.

Her Profession

tap to read

A surgeon's hands carry more responsibility than most people will ever know. You carry that weight with quiet brilliance.

Her Love For Dancing

tap to read

Whenever the music starts, something in you lights up. It's one of the most you things about you.

Our Story So Far

It's only been a week

And somehow, it already feels like this.

I.

The First Hello

It started with something small — a conversation I didn't expect to think about again. I was wrong.

II.

Hours Without Noticing

We talked, and the time just disappeared. That's usually how I know someone is going to matter.

III.

Getting To Know You

Flowers, far-off cities, dance floors, a job that saves lives — every new thing I learned about you made me gladder we'd met.

IV.

Already, So Much

It's been a little over a week, and you already feel like someone I'd hate to lose touch with.

V.

Here's To What's Next

I don't know exactly where this goes from here — I just know I'm glad to be finding out.

One More Thing

I left you a surprise

go on, open it

SURPRISE, DIANA! 🎉 In the short time I've known you, you've made a real impression — and today, of all days, I wanted you to feel that.

Hope this brought a smile to your face.

— ABC
Looking Ahead

A few wishes, just for you

Adventure
Flowers
Purpose
Joy
Dreams

Happy Birthday, Diana.

We've only just begun this friendship, but I already know it's one I'll be glad to have. However this year unfolds for you, I hope it's full of flowers, new places, good music, and days worth dancing through.

Your friend (and newest admirer of your taste),
ABC JUNE 22
